task_completion.description: Create a title page with document metadata
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look at the first page of the document for a title such as 'StockPulse WMS' and company metadata like 'Cascade Distribution Group'.

task_completion.description: Insert an auto-generated Table of Contents
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a Table of Contents section, typically featuring a gray background behind the text in OpenOffice Writer, which lists the document's headings and page numbers.

task_completion.description: Include at least 7 main sections (Heading 1) and 10 subsections (Heading 2)
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the OpenOffice Navigator pane displaying a document structure with at least 7 Heading 1 items and 10 Heading 2 items, or observe these distinctly styled headings throughout the document.

task_completion.description: Incorporate formatted tables for System Requirements, Keyboard Shortcuts, Error Codes, and workflows
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for multiple grid-style tables inserted into the document containing structured data for System Requirements, Keyboard Shortcuts, Error Codes, and procedures like Receiving or Picking.

task_completion.description: Add a footer with page numbers
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look at the bottom margin of the pages for a footer area containing page numbers. The OpenOffice status bar should also indicate a multi-page document (e.g., 'Page x / y' where y is a high number), confirming substantial content.
Look at the title bar of the OpenOffice Writer window; it should display 'StockPulse_WMS_User_Manual.odt - OpenOffice Writer'.

integrity.description: The agent used Apache OpenOffice Writer to create the document
integrity.visual_evidence: The screenshots should show the Apache OpenOffice Writer GUI being actively used to write and format the document, rather than a plain text editor.

integrity.description: The agent used Styles for formatting rather than direct formatting
integrity.visual_evidence: Look for the 'Styles and Formatting' sidebar or the style dropdown menu in the formatting toolbar showing 'Heading 1', 'Heading 2', etc., indicating that structural styles were applied.

integrity.description: The document was not generated via a terminal script
integrity.visual_evidence: The terminal should not show commands like python scripts or pandoc being used to automatically generate the .odt file from text/json files.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The document is an End-User Manual for 'StockPulse WMS' at 'Cascade Distribution Group'. It must contain 7 main sections (Introduction, System Requirements, Dashboard, Receiving, Picking, Cycle Count, Troubleshooting) and workflows for Receiving and Picking. It requires at least 4 formatted tables (System Requirements, Keyboard Shortcuts, Error Codes, Workflows). The document must use Styles (Heading 1, Heading 2), have an auto-generated TOC, a footer with page numbers, and be saved as 'StockPulse_WMS_User_Manual.odt'.
